steps.title: Find b
steps.content:
At $t=0$, the object is $40.96$ feet above the ground. Since $h(0)=-16(0)^2+b=b$, the function is
$$h(t)=-16t^2+40.96$$

steps.title: Solve h(t)=0
steps.content:
The object hits the ground when its height is $0$:
$$-16t^2+40.96=0$$
$$16t^2=40.96$$
$$t^2=2.56$$
$$t=\sqrt{2.56}=1.6$$

steps.title: Confirm the positive time
steps.content: Time cannot be negative, so use the positive solution. Since $1.6=\frac{8}{5}$, accepted entries include 1.6 or 8/5.
